retrieved_result: What does muniba mean in Urban Dictionary? What does muniba mean in Urban Dictionary? April 6, 2018 Urban Dictionary Link to this page1. a person who is always high/stoned on a regular basis2. a vampire connoisseur, knowledgeable in matters concerning transylvania, castles, in addition to rest of that dark stuff.3. a biriyani-maker. by Cleor
